text.title: Agent Eval Harness Bootstrap Recipe Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply agent-eval-harness-bootstrap-recipe. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Author the rubric: criteria + 1-5 anchors per criterion.
step.description: Input: domain knowledge. Action: Write rubric.. Output: rubric.md.

step.name: Curate the golden set ≥30 trajectories with capability tags.
step.description: Input: trace history + manual labelling. Action: Label.. Output: golden.jsonl.
step.note: Step 2. Required input: trace history + manual labelling.

step.name: Wire OTel ingest to record `eval_run_id` + `trajectory_id`.
step.description: Input: observability stack. Action: Author span attrs.. Output: OTel correlated.

step.name: Implement runner: replay each trajectory, score via judge, write `replays/<id>.json` on fail.
step.description: Input: rubric + golden + OTel. Action: Author runner.. Output: runner.py.
step.note: Step 4. Required input: rubric + golden + OTel.

step.name: Add CI gate: fail PR on per-tag pass-rate drop ≥5%.
step.description: Input: runner. Action: Configure CI.. Output: CI gated.

step.name: Schedule per-PR fast subset + nightly full per `[[agent-eval-cost-budget-policy]]`.
step.description: Input: runner + policy. Action: Add schedules.. Output: cadences live.
